name: Recruiter: bulk-message a project — DRAFT (NO SEND)
description: Selects all candidates in a project pipeline, opens the bulk InMail composer, and STOPS. It does NOT type a message and does NOT click Send. To actually send (gated, burns InMail credits): a human reviews, optionally picks a template (input[placeholder='Busca una plantilla…']) / edits subject (input[placeholder='Añade un asunto']) + body (div[role='textbox']), then clicks Enviar (button[aria-label='Enviar este mensaje']) — intentionally NOT in this flow. Params: project pipeline URL (step 1). Selectors locked offline 2026-06-08. NOTE select-all 'Select all N profiles' text is count-dependent; the css input.small-input (first match = header select-all) is the stable primary.
